emails.subject: Re: 1 more missing deal
emails.body: Re: 1 more missing deal It's just been put in Mike forgot about an EES sleeve. Evelyn Metoyer@ENRON 02/13/2001 03:21 PM

emails.subject: 1 more missing deal
emails.body: 1 more missing deal Prebon just sent over a confirm where Mike Swerzbin: buys from EES 25 mw of Q2'01 Palo off-peak at $124.95. Is this a good deal because they did not tell me about it?
